headline: Tap Water You Can Trust: 16 Pennsylvania American Water Drinking Water Treatment Plants Earn National Recognition
summary: Sixteen additional Pennsylvania American Water water treatment plants were recently recognized by the Partnership for Safe Water at the Directors and Presidents levels for achieving water quality excellence. The national awards, which honor efforts to continuously optimize water treatment plant and distribution system operation and performance, were recently announced by the American Water Works Association.
